ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for each role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station providing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "weather_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather_data table */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_query" TEXT /* Query used to generate the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_generation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report generation log */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reports table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_generation_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_generation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
